caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSSES TALK" printed in gold letters sits at a table in a studio setting. He is speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" and gold stars, and a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, a black equipment case and a black mug with red text saying "TALK OUT" are visible. Throughout the sequence, the man continues to speak, shifting his gaze slightly and adjusting his facial expression while maintaining his position. A small circular logo featuring a microphone and the words "TALK OUT" appears in the bottom left corner of the scene.
